full_text:
Bu Zhi (Zishan) 步騭 (子山)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bu Zhi (步騭), styledZishan (子山), was born in Huaiyin County, Linhuai Commandery (Presently Jingliang in Jiangsu Province). Served Sun Quan. Accurately predicted Guan Yu’s invasion of Jing. Bu Zhi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Bu Zhi lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
